title: governance.decision_* event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.15. Produced by epd2_governance_service.events.governance_decision_public_payload, shared verbatim by four distinct event_type builders: build_decision_proposed_event (governance.decision_proposed), build_decision_approved_event (governance.decision_approved), build_decision_rejected_event (governance.decision_rejected), build_decision_superseded_event (governance.decision_superseded, emitted on the SUPERSEDING decision's own approval, never on the superseded record's own status change since it never changes) - verified by reading events.py, all four call the shared payload function and differ only in event_type/subject. Deliberately omits proposed_by_role_id, approved_by_role_id, and rejected_by_role_id entirely (canon 19b.3).
